content.text: Employee SSID - provides secure credentialed WiFi for Employees to their respective agency resources at their home base
NCGovRoam SSID - provides state employees credentialed access to WiFi at DIT WLAN service locations when employees are not at their home base
NCGov Guest SSID - provides seamless guest access at DIT WLAN service locations via uncredentialed CAP WAP access

elements.alt: Network diagram showing guests and state employees connecting to various networks via access points, including the data center and OOB management components.
